name: shishya
description: Free, community-driven education companion for Indian students — schooling, entrance exams, colleges, scholarships, jobs and study abroad, with extensive info and real handholding.

scripts.seed:ssc-cgl: tsx seed/exams/ssc-cgl-syllabus.ts && tsx seed/questions/ssc-cgl-quant.ts && tsx seed/questions/ssc-cgl-reasoning.ts && tsx seed/questions/ssc-cgl-english.ts
scripts.seed:neet-ug: tsx seed/exams/neet-ug-syllabus.ts && tsx seed/questions/neet-physics.ts && tsx seed/questions/neet-chemistry.ts
scripts.seed:all: npm run seed:exams && npm run seed:ssc-cgl && npm run seed:rrb-ntpc && npm run seed:neet-ug
